description.description: The task for the agent to carry out, written as a direct prompt (e.g. "Investigate the spike in $exception events on the checkout page and open a PR with a fix"). Passed verbatim to the agent as its instructions, so be specific.

origin_product.description:
PostHog product or surface that created this task (e.g. error_tracking, slack, user_created).

* `onboarding` - Onboarding
* `error_tracking` - Error Tracking
* `eval_clusters` - Eval Clusters
* `user_created` - User Created
* `automation` - Automation
* `slack` - Slack
* `support_queue` - Support Queue
* `session_summaries` - Session Summaries
* `posthog_ai` - PostHog AI
* `experiments` - Experiments
* `signal_report` - Signal Report
* `signals_scout` - Signals Scout
* `support_reply` - Support Reply
* `hogdesk` - HogDesk
* `review_hog` - ReviewHog
* `image_builder` - Image Builder

title.description: Short human-readable title. Auto-generated from `description` when omitted.
